name: Naga Siren
description: I sing the Siren song of war. Slithice, the Naga Siren All enemy units in range of the Naga Siren are put into a magical stasis where they cannot act or be attacked, while allied units recover a percentage of their health per second.

abilities.name: Eelskin
abilities.description: Grants the Naga Siren bonus evasion.

abilities.name: Mirror Image
abilities.description: Creates multiple images of herself under Slithice's control. These illusions deals a portion of Naga Siren's damage and receives additional incoming damage.

abilities.name: Ensnare
abilities.description: Increases cast range and net projectile speed. Applies Break upon projectile impact, and enables unit-targeting and affecting debuff immune units.

abilities.name: Rip Tide
abilities.description: Each successful attack performed by the Siren's images applies the attack counter buff on Slithice.
